summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Lotus Care marketplace website. All major features working correctly including homepage sections, navigation, category pages, service listings, provider profiles, booking flow, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, categories, featured providers, stats, how it works, testimonials, recruitment banner, footer)
Navigation links work correctly for Healthcare, Home Support, Personal Support categories
Category page /category/healthcare shows filters sidebar and 4 provider cards
Category page /category/home-support displays 3 correct providers (cooking, childcare, cleaning)
Service listing page /service/1 shows provider details and functional booking widget
Provider profile page /provider/1 shows all 4 tabs (Overview, Services, Reviews, Credentials) with proper switching
Booking flow page /booking/1?package=standard shows complete 3-step stepper with all functionality
Footer renders correctly on all pages with 15 footer links
Mobile responsive navigation works with hamburger menu and mobile navigation links
All buttons and links have proper hover states and interactions
Breadcrumb navigation works correctly across all pages
Filter functionality works on category pages (price, availability, specialization)
Sort functionality works on category pages
Package selection and date picker work in booking widgets
Payment method selection works in booking flow
Form inputs work correctly across all pages
